channel.title: Electric Guitar on Kingjin.io
channel.description: Recent content in Electric Guitar on Kingjin.io

item.title: XiaoHei
item.description:
Say hello to XiaoHei: [audio link]

This is my new SSS electric guitar – a Fender Squier Affinity Stratocaster with a SSS pickup configuration. I got this Amazon bundle that includes a Mustang Micro, gig bag, strap, headphones, and picks. Since I already have Edifier MR4 monitor speakers, I can connect the Mustang Micro directly to them using a 3.5mm to dual 6.35mm TRS cable.
item.content:encoded:
Say hello to XiaoHei: [audio link]

This is my new SSS electric guitar – a Fender Squier Affinity Stratocaster with a SSS pickup configuration. I got this Amazon bundle that includes a Mustang Micro, gig bag, strap, headphones, and picks. Since I already have Edifier MR4 monitor speakers, I can connect the Mustang Micro directly to them using a 3.5mm to dual 6.35mm TRS cable.
